name: Ntdsutil Abuse
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Ntdsutil Abuse
SIGMA Description: Detects potential abuse of ntdsutil to dump ntds.dit database

False positives:
- Legitimate backup operation/creating shadow copies

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%esent%' AND ("Event ID" IN('216', '325', '326', '327')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ntdsutil Abuse on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%esent%' AND ("Event ID" IN('216', '325', '326', '327')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
